turns.content:
<objective>
Execute ALL 8 gap closure PLAN.md files for Phase 24.3.1-governance-session-prototype in wave order. The gsd-plan-checker confirmed ALL 3 previous BLOCKERs resolved, 0 remaining blockers. Proceed with full execution.

## Wave Execution Order

### Wave 0 (1 plan, no deps)
Execute Plan 00 — Session Naming Service
- Create `src/shared/session-naming.ts` with:
  - `generateSessionTitle(input: NamingInput) → string`
  - `parseSessionTitle(title: string) → NamingInput | null`
  - Format: `{framework}/{workflow}/{classification}/{agent}/{purpose}@{depth}`
  - Zero-dependency pure logic module
- Unit tests for generateSessionTitle + parseSessionTitle

### Wave 1 (2 plans, parallel — Plan 04 depends on 00, Plan 05 independent)
Execute Plan 04 — Session Tracker Title (depends on 00)
- Add `title?: string` to `SessionRecord` interface in types.ts
- Fix `initializeSessionFile` to write title into YAML frontmatter
- Fix `session-hooks.ts:302` — replace hardcoded `title: "unknown"` with real title from continuity/session metadata
- Unit tests

Execute Plan 05 — Governance Config + Naming Standards
- Create `.hivemind/governance/config.json` with agents, commands, templates, naming_standards
- Create `src/features/governance-engine/config-reader.ts` with typed config reader
- Include `validateNamingTitle()` function that validates title format against naming standards

### Wave 2 (2 plans, sequential — Plan 06b depends on 06a)
Execute Plan 06a — Spawner/Delegate Creation Points (depends on 00+05)
- Update `sdk-child-session-starter.ts:26` — replace `Delegation: ${params.agent}` with `generateSessionTitle`
- Update `session-creator.ts:21` — replace passthrough title with naming service
- Update `spawn-request-builder.ts:43` — replace `Delegation: ${agent.name}` with naming service
- Import path: `../../shared/session-naming.js` from spawn-request-builder.ts

Execute Plan 06b — Governance Tool + Config Reader (depends on 06a)
- Update `create-governance-session.ts` — remove parentID (root session), replace raw sendPrompt with coordinator.dispatch(), use naming service for title
- Wire config reader to resolve agent from brief
- Unit tests for all changes

### Wave 3 (2 plans, sequential — Plan 07b depends on 07a)
Execute Plan 07a — Core Metadata Chain (depends on 06b)
- Fix `tool-delegation.ts` — delegatedBy.agentName from parseSessionTitle
- Fix `tool-capture.ts` — captured delegation metadata
- Fix `child-recorder.ts` — mainAgent.name

Execute Plan 07b — Persistence + Tests (depends on 07a)
- Fix `event-capture.ts` — session creation metadata
- Fix `hierarchy-manifest.ts` — delegatedBy/subagentType
- Unit tests for all metadata propagation

## Critical Rules

1. **TDD**: Write tests FIRST for each change, verify they FAIL (RED), implement, verify they PASS (GREEN)
2. **Typecheck**: Run `npx tsc --noEmit` after each plan — must pass before moving to next plan
3. **Test suite**: Run `npx vitest run tests/features/governance-engine/` after each plan — all must pass
4. **Full regression**: Run `npx vitest run` after ALL plans complete — verify no regressions
5. **Atomic commits**: Commit after each plan completes with message format: `phase(24.3.1): plan {id} — {summary}`
6. **No hardcoded "unknown"**: Verify no `title: "unknown"` remains after Plan 04
7. **No phantom sessions**: Verify no `parentID` in governance session after Plan 06b

## Read These Plans
